heading: Google Accounts
body:
If you register with your Google Account, the following differences
apply when using your Google account with Atlas:

- Google manages your user details, email address, and password. You
  can't change this information using the Atlas console or API (Application Programming Interface).

- Google manages your 2FA (Two Factor Authentication). You can't use Atlas multi-factor
  authentication and won't be prompted for an Atlas 2FA (Two Factor Authentication) verification
  when you log into Atlas. Google should verify your identity using
  [Google 2-Step Verification](https://www.google.com/landing/2step/).

- If you [linked](atlas-register-account) your
  Atlas account to your Google Account, you can
  [unlink these accounts](unlink-your-mongodb-account-from-google)
  in Atlas.
